name: Mariamne Paradox, the True Dracophoenix Knight
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>真</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>凰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>マリアムネ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｐ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>パラドクス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Mariamne Paradox, the True Dragon Fenghuang Knight
desc: To Tribute Summon this card face-up, you can Tribute Continuous Spells/Traps you control, as well as monsters. You can only use each of the following effects of "Mariamne Paradox, the True Dracophoenix Knight" once per turn. If this card is in your hand: You can destroy 1 other "True Draco" or "True King" card in your hand or face-up field, and if you do, Special Summon this card to either field. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned from the hand: Banish the top 4 cards from your Deck.
mnst_eff: To Tribute Summon this card face-up, you can Tribute Continuous Spells/Traps you control, as well as monsters. You can only use each of the following effects of "Mariamne Paradox, the True Dracophoenix Knight" once per turn. If this card is in your hand: You can destroy 1 other "True Draco" or "True King" card in your hand or face-up field, and if you do, Special Summon this card to either field. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned from the hand: Banish the top 4 cards from your Deck.
eff: To Tribute Summon this card face-up, you can Tribute Continuous Spells/Traps you control, as well as monsters. You can only use each of the following effects of "Mariamne Paradox, the True Dracophoenix Knight" once per turn. If this card is in your hand: You can destroy 1 other "True Draco" or "True King" card in your hand or face-up field, and if you do, Special Summon this card to either field. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned from the hand: Banish the top 4 cards from your Deck.

summoning: Uses Spell/Trap Cards as Tributes for Normal Summon
Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your hand to your opponent's field
banished: Banishes from the top of your Deck
Banishes from the top of your opponent's Deck
